s: In 2015, Tony Zych suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.450, WHIP 1.090, SO 24, WAR 0.600.
In 2016, Tony Zych suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.290, WHIP 1.460, SO 21, WAR 0.200.
In 2017, Tony Zych suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.660, WHIP 1.250, SO 35, WAR 0.300.
